message:
feat(fp-columnar): add equals/dot/fillna_with_column/divmod parity (frankenpandas-6v8a)

Four pandas-parity Column methods for cross-column arithmetic and
alignment:

- equals(other) — element-wise Bool column via semantic_eq; missing
  positions on either side produce false (pandas: NaN != NaN).
- dot(other) — scalar inner product, missing positions contribute
  zero; non-numeric inputs return TypeError.
- fillna_with_column(other) — replace only self's missing positions
  with aligned values from `other`, casting into self.dtype.
- divmod(divisor) — Python-style floor-div + modulo tuple. Division
  by zero, NaN, or missing inputs yield Null(NaN) in both outputs at
  that position.

All operators validate equal length via LengthMismatch.

Co-lands frankenpandas-wuo1 (dot), pbh9 (fillna_with_column),
wihc (divmod).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
